critical_pir06_alert.status: ELEVATED WATCH — NO formal removal notice issued
critical_pir06_alert.summary: As of 15:31 MYT 18 Jul 2026, NO formal PN Supreme Council (Majlis Tertinggi PN) removal notice for Bersatu has been issued. However a HIGH-CONFIDENCE PRECURSOR signal has emerged: suspended Bersatu VP Datuk Seri Ronald Kiandee publicly stated the PN Supreme Council has 'asas kukuh' (strong grounds) to remove Bersatu, following Bersatu fielding candidates against PN partners in 8 seats. This is the strongest pre-formal-notice indicator yet. Monitor Kiandee/PN Supreme Council channels for the formal notice.
critical_pir06_alert.signal_actor: Datuk Seri Ronald Kiandee (suspended Bersatu VP, MP Beluran) — Facebook post

tier4_seats_bersatu_vs_pn_component.match_to_pir06_list: EXACT — all 8 seats (N.04, N.05, N.13, N.14, N.23, N.25, N.31, N.34) confirmed in candidate list

gerakan_expulsion.action: Expelled (pecat) with immediate effect by Gerakan

n14_ampangan_day1_messaging_war.ph_frame: Datuk Muhammad Nazri Kassim (PKR) — '50/50', new face replacing 2023 incumbent Zamrah
n14_ampangan_day1_messaging_war.pn_frame: Datuk Dr Mohamad Rafie Ab Malek (PAS) — 'experienced rep', former 2018 PH WINNER (majority 1,306)

n14_ampangan_day1_messaging_war.bersatu_third_candidate: Noor'azah Harun (splits anti-PH vote; Tier-4 PIR-06 overlap)
n14_ampangan_day1_messaging_war.seat_history: BN traditional -> PR/PH 2008 (maj 236) -> 2018 PH Rafie (1,306) -> 2023 PH Zamrah (329, thin) -> 2026 open 3-way

withdrawal.subject: Bujang Abu (75, street musician, ex-govt servant)
withdrawal.action: Tarik diri (withdrew) at nomination — failed to submit 2023 election expense report (SPR requirement)
withdrawal.significance: Paperwork-related independent withdrawal, NOT a party/Bersatu candidate withdrawal. Minor PIR-09 note; does NOT trigger PIR-06 Tier-4 candidate-withdrawal alert.
